live.subtitle: Transparent info from the designated manager

transit.title:
Step off the Shinkansen,
15 minutes to snow.
transit.lead: About 15 minutes by car from Shinjo Station—the Yamagata Shinkansen terminus reachable from Tokyo in as little as ~3h15. Night skiing means arrivals in the late afternoon still work—a transit-friendly local hill for day trips and after-work laps alike.
transit.imgAlt: Yamagata Shinkansen at Shinjo Station—15 minutes to the ski hill

primary.title: Three gentle courses & Chokai views
primary.lead: Mostly mellow terrain—max pitch 21°, averages around 10–15°—ideal for beginners, families, and local school ski classes. A compact municipal hill with Mt. Chokai and Gassan in view: three courses, one lift.
primary.imgAlt: Panorama of Mt. Chokai and Gassan from Shinjo Municipal slopes

secondary.title: Kids' hill & free lift for junior high and under
secondary.lead: Free sled play on the kids' hill and free lift tickets through junior high—lowering the barrier for families while lift and rental revenue from parents sustains the public-facility model.

pass.title:
Adults ¥2,000,
junior high & under free.
pass.lead: Strategic low pricing as public sports infrastructure—adult day ¥2,000, high school ¥1,000, senior ¥1,500, 11-ride book ¥3,300 for locals, while welcoming visitors from the wider region (LP concept).
pass.noticeBody: Phase from counter cash to online prepay and digital season passes—build CRM and customer data for LTV in a shrinking youth population (report recommendation).
pass.imgAlt: 15 minutes from Shinjo Station—Shinkansen access as the growth lever

rental.title:
Ski & snowboard sets
¥3,000 each—travel light.
rental.lead: Ski set, snowboard set, and outerwear ¥3,000 each—Shinkansen travelers can gear up on site and start runs immediately. No phone reservation required (counter rental).
rental.whisper: Hands-free arrival plus a Shinkansen terminus location enables low-friction winter day trips from Sendai and Tokyo (LP strategy).

yukinko.title:
Night skiing
until 21:00.
yukinko.lead: Fully lit night skiing until 21:00—first runs for late Shinkansen arrivals and after-work laps for residents. Rest and light meals at the base lodge.
yukinko.whisper: In season TEL 0233-25-3915 (ski office). Official updates also on the Shinjo City Sports Association site.
yukinko.imgAlt: Illuminated night-ski slopes—evening runs under the lights

family.title:
School ski classes &
first snow for families.
family.lead: Three mellow courses, free kids' sled hill, weekend junior lessons—the municipal gateway for winter sports education. Jump features and wide boxes for snowboard progression too.
family.noticeBody: Weekend junior ski lessons from beginners through SAJ junior badge level 1—nurturing the next generation of winter sports fans.
family.imgAlt: Families sledding on the kids' hill—separated from ski slopes

workation.title:
Shinkansen PM,
night skiing after dark.
workation.lead: Yamagata Shinkansen to Shinjo from Tokyo or Sendai—15 minutes by car to the hill. A ¥1,800 two-hour ticket for night laps until 21:00: a regional evening ski day-trip model (LP concept).

01.title: Shinkansen to Shinjo
01.body: Tokyo–Shinjo in as little as ~3h15. Terminus with Yumeria complex

02.title: Rental car at the station
02.body: Pick up near Shinjo Station—~15 minutes to the hill

03.title: Two-hour night ticket
03.body: Use the 2-hour pass in the 17:00+ night window

04.title: Base lodge
04.body: Rest and light food after runs

05.title: Shinjo & Mogami
05.body: Pair with Mogami Park, onsen, and lodging

local.title: Shinkansen terminus × municipal hill guide
local.body: Core asset in a DX pivot from Category 1 (no standalone domain)—make the physical strengths visible via mobile LP and live status: 15 minutes from Shinjo Station, night skiing until 21:00, free lift through junior high (report ch. 5).

schools.title: Designated manager & year-round sports pass
schools.body: Shinjo City Sports Association manages the ski hill, Sportia indoor facility, and municipal stadium—proposed integrated "Shinjo lifetime sports pass" spanning winter skiing and green-season indoor sport (report ch. 7, working title).

summer.title: Winter trips paired with Mogami sights
summer.body: A 1-night model linking Shinkansen access with Mogami Park, Tsuruoka Onsen, and Semei Onsen—targeting international and domestic regional visitors (report ch. 3).

access.note: About 15 minutes by car from JR Shinjo Station · 130 free parking spaces
access.places: 山形県Yamagata新庄市Shinjo五日町字柴草山5919-35919-3 Shibakusayama, Itsukamachi
access.rentacarLink: Book a rental car at Memanbetsu Airport
access.rentacarHint: For Nemuro, Shibetsu, and Abashiri drives
